subcodes.first_line: O Nightingale of the Garden of Mysteries! Though it be difficult and arduous for thee, grievous and burdensome, yet for the sake of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عندلیب گلشن اسرار هر چند بر شما سخت است و دشوار صعب است و گران ولی محض خاطر
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @courtesy; culture [adab]
